mapper.select:
SELECT q.qna_id, q.user_id, q.program_id, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.created_at, q.answered_at,
u.name AS userName, u.profile_img AS userProfileImg,
p.workshop_id, w.name AS workshopName FROM qna_workshop AS q LEFT JOIN user AS u ON q.user_id = u.user_id JOIN program AS p on q.program_id = p.program_id JOIN workshop AS w on p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE q.program_id = #{programId} ORDER BY q.created_at DESC

SELECT q.qna_id, q.user_id, q.program_id, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.created_at, q.answered_at, u.name AS userName, u.profile_img AS userProfileImg FROM qna_workshop q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.user_id WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
SELECT count(*) FROM qna_workshop WHERE program_id = #{programId}

SELECT qw.qna_id, w.name AS workshopName, p.title AS programTitle, u.name, qw.title, qw.status, qw.content, qw.answer, qw.created_at, qw.answered_at, p.program_id FROM workshop w JOIN program p ON w.workshop_id = p.workshop_id JOIN qna_workshop qw ON p.program_id = qw.program_id JOIN user u ON qw.user_id = u.user_id WHERE w.workshop_id = #{workshopId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_workshop SET answer = #{answer}, answered_at = NOW(), status = '답변완료' WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_workshop(user_id, program_id, title, content) VALUES(#{userId}, #{programId}, #{title}, #{content})
